title: website-health-analytics canonical daily dataset
description: Output contract of scripts/normalize-timeseries.mjs: one object keyed by ISO date (in the configured timezone), merging GA4, GSC, Firebase Auth, and GitHub sources. This is the input to scripts/detect-anomalies.mjs. Missing metric for a day is null (source didn't report that day); a metric is zero only when its source reported the day with zero matching rows.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name used to bucket UTC timestamps (Firebase/GitHub) into calendar days.

generatedAt.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of when normalize-timeseries.mjs produced this dataset.

sources.description: Which raw sources were actually found and loaded from --in (subset of ga4, gsc, firebase, github).

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues encountered while normalizing (e.g. a source directory had no matching files).

days.description: Keyed by calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD) in meta.timezone.

sessions.description: GA4 sessions. null if GA4 didn't report this day.

activeUsers.description: GA4 active users. null if GA4 didn't report this day.

conversions.description: GA4 conversions. null if GA4 didn't report this day.

newUsers.description: GA4 new users. null if GA4 didn't report this day.

clicks.description: GSC clicks. null if GSC didn't report this day.

impressions.description: GSC impressions. null if GSC didn't report this day.

ctr.description: GSC click-through rate (0-1). null if GSC didn't report this day.

avgPosition.description: GSC average position. Lower is better; an increase is a regression. null if GSC didn't report this day.

signups.description: Count of Firebase Auth users whose createdAt fell on this day (in meta.timezone). null if no firebase-users-*.json was loaded.

signupsByProvider.description: Signups on this day keyed by providerUserInfo[].providerId (e.g. 'password', 'google.com'). null if no firebase-users-*.json was loaded.

deploys.description: GitHub deploy-shaped events (deployments, successful workflow runs, merged PRs) attributed to this day. Always an array (empty, not null, when github-events.json was loaded but nothing landed this day).
